text:

Screenshot: searching (filtering)

(In reply to Lizbeth Mutterhunt, Ph.D. from comment #0)

> … click on widgets and try to search alphabetically …

    url             : "file:///usr/local/poudriere/data/packages/main-default",
    enabled         : yes,
